visual.name: interactiveKPICards
visual.description: A set of four interactive KPI cards with hover-to-reveal detail panels. Supports dynamic values, change pills with conditional coloring, customizable side colors, and descriptive text — all configurable from the Power BI format panel. No DAX or HTML required.

dataRoles.name: values
dataRoles.description: Add 1-4 measures — each becomes one card

dataRoles.name: icons
dataRoles.description: Optional: one SVG text measure per card, in the same order as Values

dataRoles.name: priorPeriod
dataRoles.description: Optional: one prior period measure per card, in the same order as Values
